title: Looping the Loop
writer: Robert Reinert, Arthur Robison, Robert Liebmann
actors: Werner Krauss, Jenny Jugo, Warwick Ward
plot: Botto, a world-famous circus clown, is negative towards females, because a beautiful woman he once loved laughed at him for his job at the circus. André, a young artist, is Botto's opposite. He loves women. His current love is Han...
